overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a vehicle driving through Night City. The journey begins on an elevated highway with views of the iconic Arasaka Tower, descends via a ramp past industrial satellite dishes, navigates ground-level streets beneath overpasses, and enters a covered industrial corridor with overhead piping.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with industrial district backdrop

events.description: large military truck passes in the left lane
vehicle takes exit ramp to the right, leaving main highway

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on elevated highway, overtaking other vehicles and approaching the exit

notable_agents.action: military-style truck driving in left lane alongside ego vehicle

entered.detail: tall black skyscraper with vertical white Arasaka logo dominating the skyline
factory buildings with smokestacks emitting white steam
metal safety barriers with yellow and black striped patterns
crisscrossing electrical and data cables spanning the highway
large commercial advertising screens on metal frames

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit elevated highway with the iconic Arasaka Tower visible in the distance. The vehicle travels past industrial complexes on the left, with overhead power lines crisscrossing above. A large military truck passes by in the left lane before the vehicle takes an exit ramp to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved exit ramp descending from elevated highway

events.description: transitions from straight highway to curved descending ramp
large satellite dishes become visible on industrial rooftops to the right

agents.ego_description: descending the curved exit ramp, reducing speed while navigating the downward slope

entered.detail: large parabolic communication antennas mounted on industrial building rooftops
weathered concrete walls lining the sides of the ramp
corroded metal safety fencing along the ramp edge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends a curved exit ramp, transitioning from the open highway to a more enclosed space with concrete barriers. The Arasaka Tower shifts to the right side of the frame as large satellite dishes come into view on the right. The industrial complex remains visible ahead as the vehicle approaches ground level.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level streets beneath highway overpasses with intersection

events.description: reaches bottom of ramp and enters area beneath highway overpasses
makes right turn at intersection under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through ground level streets beneath overpasses, making a right turn at an intersection

notable_agents.action: person walking along the sidewalk near industrial infrastructure

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support pillars
thick concrete columns supporting the elevated highway
low-rise commercial and industrial structures at street level
urban crossroads with traffic signals and road markings

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath massive highway overpasses in mixed lighting, the vehicle navigates ground level streets with pedestrians visible on sidewalks. The scene features thick concrete support pillars and low-rise buildings. The vehicle makes a right turn at an intersection, transitioning from the open underpass area toward a covered industrial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial roadway with overhead piping and infrastructure

events.description: enters covered industrial corridor with overhead pipe network

agents.ego_description: driving through covered industrial street with pedestrians visible on sidewalks and vehicles ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the right sidewalk under the covered structure

entered.detail: metal and concrete roofing covering the roadway overhead
large rusted industrial pipes and conduits running overhead and along walls
illuminated commercial signs and advertisements on building walls
storefronts and commercial entrances at street level

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered industrial corridor where the sky is completely obscured by overhead roofing and massive pipe networks. Neon signs illuminate the walls of street-level shops while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. The Arasaka Tower is visible in the far distance through the corridor opening as the vehicle continues through this enclosed urban infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, elevated highway that gradually descends into a claustrophobic, covered industrial corridor. It begins on a sunlit overpass with the Arasaka Tower looming in the distance, passing industrial complexes and power lines before the vehicle steers onto a curved exit ramp. As the camera descends, the open sky is replaced by concrete barriers and large satellite dishes, shifting the perspective toward the ground-level urban sprawl. The scene then moves beneath massive highway overpasses and thick concrete pillars, navigating street-level intersections with pedestrians before turning toward a more enclosed environment. Finally, the vehicle enters a covered corridor where the sky is completely obscured by overhead roofing and massive pipe networks, leaving the distant Arasaka Tower visible only through the opening of the neon-lit industrial tunnel.
